recommendation: 16 px / 1rem minimum for body text
rationale: Smaller sizes fail low-vision users and reduce readability

recommendation: 1.5x font size minimum for paragraphs
At least 2x font size between paragraphs
0.12x font size supported without loss
0.16x font size supported without loss
rationale: Readability for dyslexia and low vision

recommendation: 45-75 characters per line (~65 optimal)
Left-align (LTR) or start-align; avoid justified
Readable at 320 CSS px wide without horizontal scroll
Zoom to 200% without loss of functionality
4.5:1 against background
3:1 against background (18pt or 14pt bold)

Use font-display swap; fallback readable
Do not set uppercase for long blocks
rationale: Screen readers may spell letters; slower reading

recommendation: Body text >= 400 weight; avoid 100-300 for paragraphs
Reserve for emphasis; avoid blocks of italic
Sans-serif or dyslexia-friendly faces (Atkinson Hyperlegible Lexend)
Use decorative faces only for display headlines
Use real text not images of text except logos
rationale: Zoom and AT cannot handle image text

rationale: Color alone insufficient for color blind
